messages.content: Jarvis create a folder on desktop named test Jarvis
Folder named test Jarvis created at C:\Users\ASUS\Desktop\test Jarvis, Moksh.
in that folder add a file called test.txt and in the trial add hello this is written by Jarvis
Created a new file called test.txt in the test Jarvis folder on your desktop, Moksh, and added the text: "hello this is written by Jarvis".
Moksh, I think you meant eFootball, not football. If you'd like, I can reopen eFootball for you.
